perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a loop of the 'Lofi Girl' animation, showing a young girl studying at a desk with a cat in the window. (2) A real man wearing a grey newsboy cap, glasses, and a pink shirt appears in a studio setting, speaking directly to the camera with frequent hand gestures. (3) Visual overlays appear showing the Lofi Girl YouTube channel page and various statistics. (4) The animation changes to the girl wearing a graduation cap and holding a diploma while looking at a screen that says 'THE END'. (5) The man returns to the full frame, continuing his explanation and gesturing toward the screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Relaxed, mid-tempo lo-fi hip hop music featuring a drum machine beat and soft piano chords plays throughout. (2) A male voice speaks with a friendly and informative tone, providing a narrative about the Lofi Girl channel. (3) The music maintains a constant volume as the narration continues, with no significant ambient noise detected. (4) A subtle sparkling sound effect (SFX) occurs when the graduation theme is introduced. (5) The audio concludes with the music fading out as the vocal ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the spoken commentary throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '3c 有意思 tim 哥' and '@3ctim' appear at the top. 'Lofi Girl', '6.8億次的觀看次數', 'THE END', and '這位女生畢業啦!' appear as central labels to emphasize key points.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with animation -> Host commentary with channel screenshots -> Reveal of graduation animation -> Final reassurance.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator on screen; animation of a female character is not counted as a real person.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a grey cap, black-rimmed glasses, a pink t-shirt, and a Buddhist bead bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio with grey curtains, acoustic foam panels, and soft warm lighting. Interspersed with 2D animated cityscapes from the Lofi Girl series.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Historical Context -> News Update -> Final Reassurance
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To inform the audience about a major symbolic event in internet culture—the 'graduation' of the Lofi Girl character—while clarifying that the 24/7 music stream itself will not end, thereby leveraging a trending topic to engage viewers and provide clarity.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature grey cap and '3C 有意思' branding overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the contrast between the low-inference animation visuals and the high-inference cultural significance of the 'Lofi Girl' brand to maintain viewer interest.
